Process

The 'Hands-Off' Workflow

You upload raw files. We deliver revenue-ready assets. Zero micro-management required.

01
01. The Raw Dump

Upload raw Zoom recordings, 2-hour podcasts, or voice notes. No timestamps or scripts needed. We find the gold for you.

02

Render

02. The Retention Engineer

We don't just 'cut'. We structure the narrative, insert psychological hooks, and optimize pacing to maximize Average View Duration.

03
Requested a Revision
Revision is in progress!

03. One-Click Approval

We use Frame.io for seamless reviews. No long email chains. Just point, click, and approve in seconds

04

Thumbnail.png

Final_Cut_v2.mp4

Publish
04. Launch Ready

Receive a complete asset folder: 4K Video, Click Tested Thumbnail, and SEO Description. Ready to drag and drop.

Our Solution

The Partner Difference

Most editors cost you time. We buy it back. See the difference between a freelancer and a Growth Partner.

Typical Freelancer
  • Needs timestamps & constant instruction.
  • Just cuts footage to look 'cinematic'.
  • Misses deadlines or ghosts you.
  • Charges by the hour.
  • Delivers a video file.
The Edithood Engine
  • Autonomous 'Raw Dump' Workflow.
  • Engineers retention to drive leads.
  • 24h Turnaround. Every single day.
  • Flat monthly rate. Unlimited scale.
  • Delivers a Revenue Asset.
The Growth Partner

Custom Scope

/month

Full-service content operations for coaches generating $10k+/month. We scale as fast as you do.

Book a Call

Features included:

  • Custom Volume (15 - 60+ Assets/Month)

  • Priority 24h Turnaround

  • Dedicated Creative Director (No Middlemen)

  • Monthly Strategy & ROI Audit

  • Frame.io Enterprise Workflow

FAQ

Got Questions? We Got Answers

Straightforward, no-fluff answers to help you feel confident about working with us.

Do you work with non-business niches?

No. We exclusively partner with Coaches, Consultants, and Founders. We understand the psychology of sales and authority. We do not edit gaming, music videos, or travel vlogs.

What is the turnaround time?
Do I need to write scripts or find timestamps?
How do approvals work?
Is there a guarantee?

Ready to Install the Content Engine?

We limit our roster to ensure quality. We are currently onboarding

4 partners for this month. Secure your slot before we reach capacity.
